item.title: Apache NetBeans 25 [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: Apache NetBeans 25 [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: haylemcandelario
item.itunes:summary:
Apache NetBeans 25
(IDEs)
Apache NetBeans es un entorno de desarrollo integrado ( IDE ) potente, de código abierto y galardonado que admite una amplia gama de lenguajes y marcos de programación. Se utiliza ampliamente para desarrollar aplicaciones web, móviles y de escritorio basadas en Java, así como para C/C++, PHP y otros lenguajes.

[read more]
item.description:
Apache NetBeans 25
(IDEs)
Apache NetBeans es un entorno de desarrollo integrado ( IDE ) potente, de código abierto y galardonado que admite una amplia gama de lenguajes y marcos de programación. Se utiliza ampliamente para desarrollar aplicaciones web, móviles y de escritorio basadas en Java, así como para C/C++, PHP y otros lenguajes.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Apache NetBeans 25
(IDEs)
Apache NetBeans es un entorno de desarrollo integrado ( IDE ) potente, de código abierto y galardonado que admite una amplia gama de lenguajes y marcos de programación. Se utiliza ampliamente para desarrollar aplicaciones web, móviles y de escritorio basadas en Java, así como para C/C++, PHP y otros lenguajes.

[read more]

item.title: StackAndConquer [Board]
item.itunes:title: StackAndConquer [Board]
item.itunes:author: ElThoro
item.itunes:summary:
StackAndConquer
(Board)
StackAndConquer is a challenging tower conquest board game inspired by [url=https://spielstein.com/games/mixtour]Mixtour[/url]. Objective is to build a stack of stones with at least five stones and a stone with the players color on top.
[list]
[*] [url=https://launchpad.net/~elthoro/+archive/stackandconquer]Ubuntu PPA[/url]
[*] [url=https://software.opensuse.org/download.html?project=home%3AElThoro&package=stackandconquer]Builds for Cent OS, Debian, Fedora, openSUSE, SLE[/url]
[*] [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/releases]Windows, AppImage, macOS (untested)[/url]
[/list]
[b]Help wanted:[/b] Contribution for improved/new CPU scripts is highly welcome! A CPU opponent is created via separate JS script. Manual for creating CPU opponents can be found in the [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/wiki/Create-CPU-opponent]games wiki on GitHub[/url]. Any help in translating the game into other languages would also be greatly appreciated (for more information [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/issues/30]see here[/url])!

Note: The [b]macOS[/b] release was created automatically on a build server and is untested due to missing soft-/hardware! If you are facing any trouble, please create an issue on [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/issues]GitHub[/url] or post a comment here.
[read more]
item.description:
StackAndConquer
(Board)
StackAndConquer is a challenging tower conquest board game inspired by [url=https://spielstein.com/games/mixtour]Mixtour[/url]. Objective is to build a stack of stones with at least five stones and a stone with the players color on top.
[list]
[*] [url=https://launchpad.net/~elthoro/+archive/stackandconquer]Ubuntu PPA[/url]
[*] [url=https://software.opensuse.org/download.html?project=home%3AElThoro&package=stackandconquer]Builds for Cent OS, Debian, Fedora, openSUSE, SLE[/url]
[*] [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/releases]Windows, AppImage, macOS (untested)[/url]
[/list]
[b]Help wanted:[/b] Contribution for improved/new CPU scripts is highly welcome! A CPU opponent is created via separate JS script. Manual for creating CPU opponents can be found in the [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/wiki/Create-CPU-opponent]games wiki on GitHub[/url]. Any help in translating the game into other languages would also be greatly appreciated (for more information [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/issues/30]see here[/url])!

Note: The [b]macOS[/b] release was created automatically on a build server and is untested due to missing soft-/hardware! If you are facing any trouble, please create an issue on [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/issues]GitHub[/url] or post a comment here.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
StackAndConquer
(Board)
StackAndConquer is a challenging tower conquest board game inspired by [url=https://spielstein.com/games/mixtour]Mixtour[/url]. Objective is to build a stack of stones with at least five stones and a stone with the players color on top.
[list]
[*] [url=https://launchpad.net/~elthoro/+archive/stackandconquer]Ubuntu PPA[/url]
[*] [url=https://software.opensuse.org/download.html?project=home%3AElThoro&package=stackandconquer]Builds for Cent OS, Debian, Fedora, openSUSE, SLE[/url]
[*] [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/releases]Windows, AppImage, macOS (untested)[/url]
[/list]
[b]Help wanted:[/b] Contribution for improved/new CPU scripts is highly welcome! A CPU opponent is created via separate JS script. Manual for creating CPU opponents can be found in the [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/wiki/Create-CPU-opponent]games wiki on GitHub[/url]. Any help in translating the game into other languages would also be greatly appreciated (for more information [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/issues/30]see here[/url])!

Note: The [b]macOS[/b] release was created automatically on a build server and is untested due to missing soft-/hardware! If you are facing any trouble, please create an issue on [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/issues]GitHub[/url] or post a comment here.
[read more]

item.title: Microsoft Office 365 AppImage - Nao oficial [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Microsoft Office 365 AppImage - Nao oficial [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: walberthvieira
item.itunes:summary:
Microsoft Office 365 AppImage - Nao oficial
(Office Apps)
About the application:
Application developed using Electron. Packaged using AppImageTools. It basically opens the Microsoft Office 365 login screen.

1. Download the Microsoft_Office_365_AppImage_20250516-21h55 Latest file.
2. Unzip it and open the extracted folder.
3. Tap the Instalar.sh executable file and run it.
4. The application has been installed successfully.
-------------------------------------------------------------------
Sobre a aplicação:
Aplicação desenvolvida usando Electron. Empacotada usando AppImageTools. Ela basicamente abre a tela de login do Microsoft Office 365.

1. Baixe o arquivo Microsoft_Office_365_AppImage_20250516-21h55 Latest.
2. Descompacte-o e abra a pasta extraída.
3. Toque o arquivo Instalar.sh executável e o execute.
4. O aplicativo foi instalado com sucesso.

Vídeo ensinando a instalar:
https://youtu.be/DAcmosUJKyM
[read more]
item.description:
Microsoft Office 365 AppImage - Nao oficial

About the application:
Application developed using Electron. Packaged using AppImageTools. It basically opens the Microsoft Office 365 login screen.

2. Unzip it and open the extracted folder.
3. Tap the Instalar.sh executable file and run it.
4. The application has been installed successfully.
-------------------------------------------------------------------
Sobre a aplicação:
Aplicação desenvolvida usando Electron. Empacotada usando AppImageTools. Ela basicamente abre a tela de login do Microsoft Office 365.

1. Baixe o arquivo Microsoft_Office_365_AppImage_20250516-21h55 Latest.
2. Descompacte-o e abra a pasta extraída.
3. Toque o arquivo Instalar.sh executável e o execute.
4. O aplicativo foi instalado com sucesso.

Vídeo ensinando a instalar:
https://youtu.be/DAcmosUJKyM
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Microsoft Office 365 AppImage - Nao oficial
(Office Apps)
About the application:
Application developed using Electron. Packaged using AppImageTools. It basically opens the Microsoft Office 365 login screen.

1. Download the Microsoft_Office_365_AppImage_20250516-21h55 Latest file.
2. Unzip it and open the extracted folder.
3. Tap the Instalar.sh executable file and run it.
4. The application has been installed successfully.
-------------------------------------------------------------------
Sobre a aplicação:
Aplicação desenvolvida usando Electron. Empacotada usando AppImageTools. Ela basicamente abre a tela de login do Microsoft Office 365.

1. Baixe o arquivo Microsoft_Office_365_AppImage_20250516-21h55 Latest.
2. Descompacte-o e abra a pasta extraída.
3. Toque o arquivo Instalar.sh executável e o execute.
4. O aplicativo foi instalado com sucesso.

Vídeo ensinando a instalar:
https://youtu.be/DAcmosUJKyM
[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]
item.description:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.

* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]

item.title: MATE Random Background [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: MATE Random Background [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
MATE Random Background
(Graphic Apps)
Simple background changer for MATE
Make changes to your desktop in desired time intervals.
Just add your favorite pics in your ~/Wallpapers folder

With the notify icon menu you can make changes on the fly
or from selected intervals.
Supports: png, jpg, jpeg, gif and bmp images
Supports: Multiple work spaces on the desktop
[read more]
item.description:
MATE Random Background
(Graphic Apps)
Simple background changer for MATE
Make changes to your desktop in desired time intervals.
Just add your favorite pics in your ~/Wallpapers folder

With the notify icon menu you can make changes on the fly
or from selected intervals.
Supports: png, jpg, jpeg, gif and bmp images
Supports: Multiple work spaces on the desktop
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
MATE Random Background
(Graphic Apps)
Simple background changer for MATE
Make changes to your desktop in desired time intervals.
Just add your favorite pics in your ~/Wallpapers folder

With the notify icon menu you can make changes on the fly
or from selected intervals.
Supports: png, jpg, jpeg, gif and bmp images
Supports: Multiple work spaces on the desktop
[read more]

item.title: BusyTasks [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:title: BusyTasks [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:author: unknown-spirit
item.itunes:summary:
BusyTasks
(System Monitoring)
Isn't everything some kind of process? At least on a computer it is. So let's keep an eye on them. This program is a java implementation of my [url=https://www.pling.com/p/1002049/]BusyTasks plasmoid[/url] for the KDE4 desktop and [url=https://www.pling.com/p/2153869]BusyTasksPlasmoid[/url] for KDE Plasma 5/6.
This program is a frontend for several command line tools. The collected data is neither unique nor new, but the idea to clearly sum it up in one single program is. This task monitor displays up to four different tasks, each with different priority.
BusyTasks is intended as small and always visible desktop monitor. If you had got to minimize windows or show the desktop to have a glance on it you could equally start the system monitor.

[b]Linux[/b]
BusyTasks in java for Linux is back. This version is for anyone who does not use KDE.

[b]Windows[/b] Side (and sad) note:
In contrast to Linux, Windows is very obsessed with marking my program as malware. Of course, it is not. You may have to add BusyTasks to the list of exceptions in Microsoft Defender Antivirus before starting it.

Please read the manual (see files) before installation!
Moreover, I'd be very grateful for any kind of feedback.
[read more]
item.description:
BusyTasks
(System Monitoring)
Isn't everything some kind of process? At least on a computer it is. So let's keep an eye on them. This program is a java implementation of my [url=https://www.pling.com/p/1002049/]BusyTasks plasmoid[/url] for the KDE4 desktop and [url=https://www.pling.com/p/2153869]BusyTasksPlasmoid[/url] for KDE Plasma 5/6.
This program is a frontend for several command line tools. The collected data is neither unique nor new, but the idea to clearly sum it up in one single program is. This task monitor displays up to four different tasks, each with different priority.
BusyTasks is intended as small and always visible desktop monitor. If you had got to minimize windows or show the desktop to have a glance on it you could equally start the system monitor.

[b]Linux[/b]
BusyTasks in java for Linux is back. This version is for anyone who does not use KDE.

[b]Windows[/b] Side (and sad) note:
In contrast to Linux, Windows is very obsessed with marking my program as malware. Of course, it is not. You may have to add BusyTasks to the list of exceptions in Microsoft Defender Antivirus before starting it.

Please read the manual (see files) before installation!
Moreover, I'd be very grateful for any kind of feedback.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
BusyTasks
(System Monitoring)
Isn't everything some kind of process? At least on a computer it is. So let's keep an eye on them. This program is a java implementation of my [url=https://www.pling.com/p/1002049/]BusyTasks plasmoid[/url] for the KDE4 desktop and [url=https://www.pling.com/p/2153869]BusyTasksPlasmoid[/url] for KDE Plasma 5/6.
This program is a frontend for several command line tools. The collected data is neither unique nor new, but the idea to clearly sum it up in one single program is. This task monitor displays up to four different tasks, each with different priority.
BusyTasks is intended as small and always visible desktop monitor. If you had got to minimize windows or show the desktop to have a glance on it you could equally start the system monitor.

[b]Linux[/b]
BusyTasks in java for Linux is back. This version is for anyone who does not use KDE.

[b]Windows[/b] Side (and sad) note:
In contrast to Linux, Windows is very obsessed with marking my program as malware. Of course, it is not. You may have to add BusyTasks to the list of exceptions in Microsoft Defender Antivirus before starting it.

Please read the manual (see files) before installation!
Moreover, I'd be very grateful for any kind of feedback.
[read more]

item.title: FastCat - FastFetch Theme Pack [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: FastCat - FastFetch Theme Pack [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: m3tozz
item.itunes:summary:
FastCat - FastFetch Theme Pack
(Terminal Apps)
What is FastCat:
FastCat is a theme pack for FastFetch. FastFetch is a tool that visually displays system information in the terminal, and FastCat offers various themes to make this tool more aesthetic and customizable. FastCat allows users to customize their FastFetch configurations and load the selected themes onto their systems.
-
Theme List: https://m3tozz.github.io/FastCat-Themes/
-
Community Discord Server: https://discord.gg/sQwYCZer95
-
Start FastCat="bash ./fastcat.sh --shell"
Back Up Your Own FastFetch Configuration="bash ./fastcat.sh --backup"
Install Terminal Icons ="bash ./install-icons.sh"
Download The Required Icon Pack (For Arch Linux)= git clone https://aur.archlinux.org/ttf-meslo-nerd-font-powerlevel10k.git && cd ttf-meslo-nerd-font-powerlevel10k && makepkg -si && cd ..
-
[read more]

FastCat allows users to customize their FastFetch configurations and load the selected themes onto their systems.

Back Up Your Own FastFetch Configuration="bash ./fastcat.sh --backup"

-
[read more]

FastCat allows users to customize their FastFetch configurations and load the selected themes onto their systems.

item.title: NeoCat - NeoFetch Theme Pack. [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: NeoCat - NeoFetch Theme Pack. [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: m3tozz
item.itunes:summary:
NeoCat - NeoFetch Theme Pack.
(Terminal Apps)
What is NeoCat:
NeoCat is a theme pack for NeoFetch. NeoFetch is a tool that visually displays system information in the terminal, and NeoCat offers various themes to make this tool more aesthetic and customizable. NeoCat allows users to customize their NeoFetch configurations and load the selected themes onto their systems.
-
Preview Themes: https://m3tozz.github.io/NeoCat-Themes/
Community Discord Server: https://discord.gg/sQwYCZer95
-
Start NeoCat="bash ./neocat.sh --shell"
Back Up Your Own NeoFetch Configuration="bash ./neocat.sh --backup"
Install Terminal Icon="bash ./install-icons.sh"
Download The Required Icon Pack (For Arch Linux)= git clone https://aur.archlinux.org/ttf-meslo-nerd-font-powerlevel10k.git && cd ttf-meslo-nerd-font-powerlevel10k && makepkg -si && cd ..
[read more]

NeoCat is a theme pack for NeoFetch. NeoFetch is a tool that visually displays system information in the terminal, and NeoCat offers various themes to make this tool more aesthetic and customizable. item.title: Terabox [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Terabox [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: haylemcandelario
item.itunes:summary:
Terabox
(Internet Apps)
TeraBox es una aplicación innovadora de almacenamiento en la nube que protege todos los archivos de tu dispositivo, los organiza por ti, y te ayuda a crear una copia de respaldo de manera rápida y buscar entre tus fotos usando una tecnología de inteligencia artificial .

[read more]
item.description:
Terabox
(Internet Apps)
TeraBox es una aplicación innovadora de almacenamiento en la nube que protege todos los archivos de tu dispositivo, los organiza por ti, y te ayuda a crear una copia de respaldo de manera rápida y buscar entre tus fotos usando una tecnología de inteligencia artificial .

[read more]

Terabox
(Internet Apps)
TeraBox es una aplicación innovadora de almacenamiento en la nube que protege todos los archivos de tu dispositivo, los organiza por ti, y te ayuda a crear una copia de respaldo de manera rápida y buscar entre tus fotos usando una tecnología de inteligencia artificial .

[read more]
